aeo_readiness.summary: SuperTech Services has a decent foundation for AEO readiness with structured content and a focus on local services. However, there are several areas for improvement to enhance visibility and user engagement.
quick_wins: Update the promotional offer on the website to reflect the current date.
Implement a review generation strategy to accumulate Google reviews.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant keywords for better search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes location-specific content and service details, but there is no explicit mention of Baltimore beyond the title and a generic reference in the content.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business demonstrates some locality relevance but lacks depth in Google Business Profile (GBP) optimization. The absence of reviews and detailed location information is a significant drawback.
critical_issues: No Google reviews to build trust and credibility.
Insufficient location-specific content to improve local search ranking.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are not prominently displayed on the website, which can affect local search performance. Additionally, there is no evidence of consistent NAP citations across directories.
action_items: Add a dedicated NAP section on the website with complete and consistent information.
Audit and update NAP citations across major directories and platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of user-generated content and reviews to boost search engine trust and visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Baltimore due to low local SEO optimization and lack of reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and updating promotional content to current dates.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, locally-focused content such as blog posts about HVAC tips for Baltimore winters and summers, and engaging with local community events to build authority.

page_title: Baltimore Top Rated Heating and AC Company - SuperTech HVAC Services
